components.name: Cloud to Cloud Migrations - Copy Product Data
components.description: Copy data from one cloud to another without overwriting any existing data. You can copy data to a new or an existing site within the same org or in a different org.

components.name: Server to Cloud Migrations - Copy Product Data

incidents.name: Multiple Atlassian services are experiencing issues

incident_updates.body:
Our services are now fully operational. We continue to replay any events that were missed during the incident, and are making good progress. We will provide a further update once replays are complete. If you experience any ongoing issues, please contact our support team.

We apologise for the disruption and thank you for your patience.

affected_components.name: Cloud to Cloud Migrations - Copy Product Data
Server to Cloud Migrations - Copy Product Data

incident_updates.body: We continue to monitor the situation as services recover. We are currently in the process of clearing the backlog of queued events. We will provide a further update in approximately one hour.

affected_components.name: Cloud to Cloud Migrations - Copy Product Data
Server to Cloud Migrations - Copy Product Data

incident_updates.body: The underlying issue in public infrastructure which affected asynchronous event processing has been mitigated and all the affected services are recovering. We are now working on clearing the backlog of queued events, which means some actions (such as notifications, automation triggers, and data syncs) may be in degraded state. We will continue to monitor and provide updates as the backlog is cleared.

affected_components.name: Cloud to Cloud Migrations - Copy Product Data
Server to Cloud Migrations - Copy Product Data

incident_updates.body: We are continuing to work with our public cloud provider to mitigate this issue. We are starting to see some recovery in regions outside of Eastern USA, however, users globally may still be experiencing issues with certain product features. These are listed at the bottom of each product page.

affected_components.name: Cloud to Cloud Migrations - Copy Product Data
Server to Cloud Migrations - Copy Product Data

incident_updates.body: Our teams continue to work on mitigating the infrastructure outage from our public cloud provider. We will provide further updates when they are available.

incident_updates.body: We have identified that the root cause of the issue is related to an infrastructure outage from our public cloud provider. We are working closely with them to mitigate this issue. We will provide further updates when they become available.
